description.atmosphere: The tavern bustles with activity. Adventurers gather around tables, sharing tales and seeking companions for dangerous quests.
description.subtitle: Choose your path, adventurer...
description.ambient_details: Smoke drifts from pipes, ale flows freely, and the fire crackles warmly in the hearth.

patron_selection.intro: You scan the tavern and notice several interesting patrons...

description.atmosphere: A dimly lit corner where fortune seekers test their luck against the dice.
description.subtitle: Will fortune favor you tonight?
description.ambient_details: The soft clatter of dice mingles with whispered curses and triumphant cheers.
description.rules_text: Roll two dice - match or beat the house roll to win!

description.atmosphere: Garrick polishes glasses behind the sturdy oak bar, bottles of various spirits lined up behind him.
description.subtitle: Information and supplies for the discerning adventurer
description.ambient_details: The scent of ale and roasted meat fills the air, while Garrick's knowing eyes suggest he's seen every type of adventurer.
description.merchant_greeting: What can I get for ye, traveler? Information or supplies - I've got both.

main_door.description: Heavy wooden doors leading to the town square

gambling_corner.description: A shadowy corner filled with the sound of dice

bar_counter.description: The polished oak bar where Garrick holds court

metadata.author: Terror in Redstone Development
metadata.notes: Complete tavern complex with all sub-areas
